scripts.pkg:build: npm run build && esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/bundle.cjs && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../bin',{recursive:true})"
scripts.pkg:win11: npm run pkg:build && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output ../bin/cmake2ide.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run pkg:build && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output ../bin/cmake2ide
scripts.pkg:macos: npm run pkg:build && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64,node20-macos-arm64 --output ../bin/cmake2ide
